message:
chore(beads): track targeted scan bypass regression as in-progress bug

Add issue ultimate_bug_scanner-2e7b documenting how targeted UBS modes
(--diff, --staged, explicit file lists) regress in large repos because
the meta-runner performs whole-tree size checks and ignore-copy staging
before narrowing to the actual target set. This causes --diff to fail
with directory-too-large errors even when only a handful of files
changed, and --version to emit unrelated size-check diagnostics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"ultimate_bug_scanner-29","title":"Add comprehensive post-install verification","description":"Verify ubs command, test dependencies, run smoke tests, check hooks, validate module cache","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-11-16T22:38:55.556705938Z","updated_at":"2025-11-16T22:46:54.259450893Z","closed_at":"2025-11-16T22:46:54.259450893Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
+{"id":"ultimate_bug_scanner-2e7b","title":"Fix targeted scans bypassing explicit file/diff workflows","description":"Targeted UBS modes regress in large repos because the meta-runner performs whole-tree size checks and ignore-copy staging before narrowing to --diff/--staged/explicit files.

Symptoms:
- `ubs --diff` can fail with directory-too-large in big repos even when only a handful of files changed.
- `ubs file1 file2` / `ubs --files=...` hit full-repo staging first instead of respecting the target list.
- `ubs --version` also emits size-check diagnostics before the version string.

Goal:
- Make `--diff`, `--staged`, and explicit file scans avoid whole-tree size checks/copies.
- Make `--version` exit before unrelated scan guards.
- Add regression coverage.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-03-06T03:55:30.729325683Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-06T03:55:33.075797933Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"ultimate_bug_scanner-2eb","title":"Add daily auto-update prompt and configuration to installer","description":"The installer should prompt the user if they want to enable daily auto-updates. If confirmed, it should set up a mechanism (e.g., cron) to run 'ubs --update' or similar daily.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-11-19T17:20:20.351807102Z","updated_at":"2025-11-19T17:27:42.465051459Z","closed_at":"2025-11-19T17:27:42.465057859Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"ultimate_bug_scanner-2hga","title":"FEATURE: ubs robot-docs JSON (capabilities + examples)","description":"Problem: Agents need a machine-readable summary of UBS commands, flags, and output formats.

Goal:
- Add `ubs robot-docs <topic>` or `ubs --robot-docs` that emits JSON/NDJSON.
- Topics: guide (quickstart), commands/flags, examples, exit-codes, output formats.
- stdout data-only; stderr diagnostics.

Acceptance:
- Documented in README/AGENTS.
- Includes version + schema_version metadata.
- Covers JSON/JSONL/SARIF/TOON format notes.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-25T10:20:15.009930900Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T10:20:15.009930900Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["agent-friendly","docs","json"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ultimate_bug_scanner-2hga","depends_on_id":"bd-2uq","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-01-25T10:20:15.009930900Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"ultimate_bug_scanner-2jby","title":"Update all dependencies to latest stable versions","description":"## Dependency Update for ultimate_bug_scanner

### Context
UBS is a Bash script that manages external tool dependencies via uv (Python tools), npm, and system packages. "Updating dependencies" means ensuring all scanner tools are at latest versions.

### Steps
1. `cd /data/projects/ultimate_bug_scanner`
2. Check uv-managed Python tools: `uv tool list` -- note versions of bandit, semgrep, ruff, mypy, pylint
3. Update Python tools: `uv tool upgrade --all`
4. Check npm-managed tools: eslint, prettier versions in package.json if applicable
5. Run `./ubs --doctor` -- verify all scanners detected and working
6. Run `./ubs --python /data/projects/mcp_agent_mail` -- smoke test Python scanning
7. Verify module loading: each `modules/ubs-*.sh` should load without errors

### Key Tools to Watch
- `bandit` -- Python security scanner, new rules may change findings
- `semgrep` -- multi-language scanner, rule updates
- `ruff` -- Python linter (very fast iteration), new rules frequently
- `shellcheck` -- Bash linter
- `toon` -- TOON output formatter (custom tool)

### Verification
- `./ubs --doctor` passes all checks
- Python module runs without errors
- Bash module runs without errors
- Finding counts are reasonable (not zero, not explosion of new findings)","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-11T06:19:14.009699268Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-11T07:44:33.215720817Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
